gt_sql: SELECT CASE WHEN T2.ALB >= 3.5 AND T2.ALB <= 5.5 THEN 'normal' ELSE 'abnormal' END FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T1.Birthday) = '1982'
pred_sql:
SELECT CASE WHEN T2.ALB >= 3.5 AND T2.ALB <= 5.5 THEN 'normal' ELSE 'abnormal' END
FROM Patient AS T1
INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID
WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T1.Birthday) = '1982'
question: For all patient born in 1982, state if their albumin is within normal range.
